garages.name: AT&T Stadium (Cowboys) — Lots
garages.notes:
Cowboys + concerts. Massive surface lots. RV tailgating.
Reclassified 2026-04-30 as surface lot per web research: All AT&T Stadium parking is open surface lots

garages.name: AT&T Stadium — RV Lot (Lot 11)
garages.notes:
Designated RV lot on game days.
Reclassified 2026-04-30 as surface lot per web research: Per attstadium.com, RV/oversize parking is in Silver Lot 14, surface only
